sections.paragraph: prop. a slender rod (root סָלַל No. II.), of which baskets are woven; hence a basket woven of rods (compare κάνεον, κανίας, κάναστρον canistrum; prop. a basket made of reeds; from κάνη, reed); a wicker-basket, a bread-basket; plur. סַלִּים Gen 40:17 Exo 29:3, 32 Exo 29:32. Arab. سَاَّةُ id., سَلَّالُ a basket maker. Zab. ܣܶܠܰܬ a basket.
